title: Plight of Kg Baru Sg Buloh folk: Pothole Hazards
snippet: Residents and traders in Kampung Baru Sungai Buloh reported 'crater-like' potholes in the main carpark and market areas, causing significant safety risks and vehicle damage.

title: MRT Putrajaya Line: Sg Buloh - Damansara Damai Disruption
snippet: A major service disruption occurred on the MRT Putrajaya Line between the Sungai Buloh and Damansara Damai stations due to cable theft, stranding thousands of peak-hour commuters.

title: Reopen Junction to Ease Traffic woes in Kg Baru Sungai Buloh
snippet: Local representatives and residents called for the urgent reopening of a closed junction to alleviate worsening traffic gridlock which has significantly increased travel times for locals.

title: MRT Feeder Bus Reliability Issues: T818 and T852
snippet: Commuters lodged formal complaints regarding the unreliability of MRT feeder buses, citing long wait times and buses being 'untraceable' on tracking apps, forcing reliance on private cars.
